messages.text: <@U06F97BPQJU> If you need to generally get ahold of the employees this is a good channel to do it.

<@U04V1L47P7Y> <@U01LKAFAS58> a general PSA about channels. I'm trying to work on having better organization within our slack. To that end here are some channels and what they should be used for:

1. <#C06KCDLH1NK> Discussion of any SESO for hot mix. Please get into the habit of calling it by it's new product name (SIP1111) 
2. <#C06KVE6MVK6> Discussion of use of SIP 1111 as a warm mix additive. I don't expect a lot to be going on in this channel right now, but hopefully it'll be picking up in the near future
3. <#C06BSTT8K8R|> Discussion of use of emulsified SESO for the roofing application. This should really be focused on the asphalt roofing for now. For other emulsions developments see:
4. <#C06LFQ21532> Where we discuss new applications. Once we've decided on which ones we're going to pursue further (coming soon), we'll probably break these out into some channels 
5. <#C06KQ7U9S4D> This is a concrete overlay development. I've given it a temporary product number, but this is likely to change as we figure out exactly what it's going to be. 
6. <#C06F7SD9Z0A> If you have an idea that doesn't fit into one of the above categories, this is a good general channel 
7. <#C051W72HRNY|> place for you guys to generally talk logistics. Please note that project related things should be in one of the above channels, but this would be a good place to mention something like "I'm sick and will be out tomorrow" or something like that. 
Also, starting the first full week in March, we're going back to posting the weekly availability in this channel. It should include such information as: what is your current work balance (SL/non-SL) and what conflicts do you have during normal business hours (8-5).

Last piece, <@U04V1L47P7Y> <@U01LKAFAS58> <@U012ETLV6NQ> we're having a new application development discussion tomorrow at 2:00. You don't all have to be there, but I would appreciate it if you were. I think this is a discussion that you all can definitely contribute to.
